subject: [PATCH v4 03/21] mm: swap: add an abstract API for locking out swapoff

2026-03-18.patch_summary: This patch introduces an abstract API to lock out swapoff in the Linux kernel's memory management system. The current implementation of locking out swapoff is based on getting a reference to the backing swap device, which does not make sense in the new virtual swap design where swap entries may not have a backing swap device. This patch abstracts away the swapoff locking behavior into a generic API called `tryget_swap_entry` and `put_swap_entry`, allowing for more flexibility and decoupling of swap backends from swap entries. The changes are made to various kernel files, including `memory.c`, `mincore.c`, and others.
